stemHtml:
Refer to GSPRM Jeppesen E(LO)2.
You are planning to fly from Pole Hill (POL, N53º45' W002º06') to Dean Cross (DCS, N54º43' W003º20'). What is the shortest applicable route between those two points?

options.a: POL - RIBEL - N601 - TLA - UNURO - N864 - DCS
options.b: POL - Y70 - KOLID - GUNTU - N864 - DCS
